scripts.publish: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', {recursive: true, force: true})" && pnpm build && pnpm update-manifest && pnpm update-assets && pnpm update-htmls && pnpm update-css && node -e "try { require('fs').unlinkSync('dist/content/content-lib.js'); } catch(e) {}" && node -e "try { require('fs').unlinkSync('dist/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo'); } catch(e) {}"
scripts.update-assets: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); function copyDir(src, dest) { fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive: true}); const entries = fs.readdirSync(src, {withFileTypes: true}); for (const entry of entries) { const srcPath = path.join(src, entry.name); const destPath = path.join(dest, entry.name); if (entry.isDirectory()) copyDir(srcPath, destPath); else fs.copyFileSync(srcPath, destPath); } } copyDir('assets', 'dist/assets');"
scripts.update-htmls: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); function copyFiles(srcDir, destDir, ext) { fs.mkdirSync(destDir, {recursive: true}); const files = fs.readdirSync(srcDir).filter(f => f.endsWith(ext)); files.forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(path.join(srcDir, f), path.join(destDir, f))); } copyFiles('src/options', 'dist/options', '.html'); copyFiles('src/popup', 'dist/popup', '.html'); copyFiles('src/sidepanel', 'dist/sidepanel', '.html');"
scripts.update-css: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); function copyFiles(srcDir, destDir, ext) { fs.mkdirSync(destDir, {recursive: true}); const files = fs.readdirSync(srcDir).filter(f => f.endsWith(ext)); files.forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(path.join(srcDir, f), path.join(destDir, f))); } copyFiles('src/options', 'dist/options', '.css'); copyFiles('src/popup', 'dist/popup', '.css'); copyFiles('src/content', 'dist/content', '.css'); copyFiles('src/sidepanel', 'dist/sidepanel', '.css');"
